description: Capability set for the always-on-top HQ wordmark widget window (US-002) and its US-003 notification stack. Receives widget:notification / widget:occlusion events via core:event; invokes widget_ready (initial occlusion handshake) and resize_widget (grow up/left for notification rows while keeping the lower-right anchor). No extra permission entries for app commands — mirrors dm-banner.json (core:default + core:event:default cover the webview shell).
